jp.title: SixTONES松村北斗主演ドラマ『告白』で岡崎紗絵がヒロイン役に 脚本・渡邉真子が明かす松村の印象「アイデアを掻き立てられる」

jp.title: 「MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN」演歌・歌謡曲部門の授賞式決定 新浜レオンや山内惠介ら出演
jp.description: 国内最大規模の国際音楽賞「MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026」で最も優秀な演歌・歌謡曲を表彰する「MUSIC AWARDS JAPAN 2026 演歌・歌謡曲LIVE（最優秀演歌・歌謡曲 楽曲賞 授賞式）」が6月11日に東京・Zepp DiverCity（TOKYO）で開催される...

jp.title: 映画「未来」黒島結菜さん・北川景子さんインタビュー 湊かなえ原作、絶望に見いだす禁断の光
jp.description: 湊かなえさんのミステリー小説が映画化。過酷な運命に吞み込まれながら、希望を見出す少女を見守る担任教師・篠宮真唯子役の黒島結菜さん、自身も壮絶な人生を歩む少女の母・佐伯文乃役の北川景子さんに聞きました。

jp.title: 【随時更新】百想芸術大賞2026の受賞結果を速報レポート
jp.description: 韓国のゴールデングローブ賞ともいわれる、第62回百想（ペクサン）芸術大賞の受賞速報をお届け！　今年は司会をおなじみパク・ボゴム、ペ・スジ、シン・ドンヨプの3人がつとめ、ジュノ、ジニョン、ユナなどの”演技ドル”も多数ノミネート。授賞式は5月8日にソウルで開催。

jp.title: ギデンズ・コーの最新作「功夫」公開、香港&台湾の武侠作品へオマージュ捧げたファンタジー（予告あり）
jp.description: 「赤い糸 輪廻のひみつ」のギデンズ・コー（九把刀）とクー・チェンドン（柯震東）が再タッグを組んだ台湾映画「功夫」が「ギデンズ・コーの功夫（カンフー）」の邦題で6月5日より、東京・新文芸坐ほかで公開決定。YouTubeで予告編が...

jp.title: 《SHINJOの信条》野村くんの見逃しは…見逃し以外だったらまだチャンスはあったかな

jp.title: 「世界一を取りにいく」Snow Manラウール、ダンス世界大会予選で優勝！目撃されていた“本番前”の姿
jp.description: 4月12日、埼玉県内の市民ホールで行われた『ALL JAPAN HIP HOP DANCE CHAMPIONSHIP 2026』。Snow Manのラウールは、世界大会出場をかけた国内最高峰の舞台

jp.title: 「ハンタウイルス」死亡の夫婦、ゴミ処理施設で“接触”か クルーズ船はカナリア諸島沖合に停泊へ
jp.description: ハンタウイルスの集団感染の疑いがあるクルーズ船をめぐり、5人の感染が確認されました。最初に死亡した2人はゴミ処理施設でネズミと接触した可能性があるということです。

world.title: iOS 26 adds fun way to customize your iPhone wallpaper, here’s how to use it
world.description: iOS 26 keeps adding new ways to customize your iPhone, but one of my favorites was there in the first release: 3D spatial wallpapers.

world.title: 17 American passengers aboard hantavirus-hit cruise ship will quarantine in Nebraska
world.description: Seventeen American passengers aboard the cruise ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak will quarantine at a Nebraska facility that specializes in handling patients with highly communicable diseases, health officials said

world.title: The perfect storm at Mizuho: Major-level links meet 'May' weather at Mountain Ridge
world.description: The second round of the Mizuho Americas Open was met with blustery and cold conditions that made it feel more like November out on the course than early May.

world.title: Celtics’ Playoffs Collapse Raises New Questions About Jaylen Brown’s Future in Boston
world.description: After blowing a 3–1 series lead to Philadelphia, Boston enters a pivotal offseason with frontcourt concerns and growing intrigue around the All-NBA guard.

world.title: Short bouts of exercise help smokers manage immediate nicotine cravings
world.description: Exercise may offer smokers a simple but effective additional tool when trying to quit, according to a new systematic review led by researchers from the Alliance for Research in Exercise, Nutrition and Activity (ARENA) at Adelaide University.

world.title: Two Albertans came in contact with hantavirus on international flight
world.description: Canadian health officials are monitoring two people in Alberta for possible exposure to hantavirus linked to an outbreak aboard a cruise ship.

world.title: Google unveils screenless Fitbit Air, new Google Health app
world.description: The Fitbit app has been rebranded as the Google Health app, where users can view their data, upload medical records and receive AI-enabled health coaching.

world.title: Teals exploit donations gap in campaign to unseat Jess Wilson
world.description: Climate 200 has given $40,000 each to teal candidates in the Liberal-held seats of Kew and Hawthorn, taking advantage of the gaping hole in campaign finance laws.

world.title: King Charles features in surprise birthday tribute to David Attenborough
world.description: Whimsical film shows relay of animals carrying centennial card from Balmoral Castle to naturalist in London

world.title: Dede, Kaybobo, Shaun, Imisi & More Bring Regal Fashion to #AMVCA12 Cultural Night
world.description: BBNaija Season 10 stars including Dede, Imisi, Kaybobo, and Shaun showcased diverse Nigerian heritages at the AMVCA 12 Cultural Night. From Delta State pride to Edo royalty and Yoruba Adire, the guests used traditional textiles, cowries, and coral beads to celebrate the 2026 awards. - BellaNaija.com. May 9, 2026
